subcodes.title: The Spiritual Meetings in Paris: Words spoken on 1911-11-04 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: All over Europe today one hears of meetings and assemblies, and societies of all kinds are formed. There are those interested in commerce
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اروپا مجامع بسیار تشکیل میشود از قبیل مجالس تجارت زراعت معارف سیاست جغرافیا
